headline: Caterpillar (CAT) Stock Faces Michael Burry Short As Valuation Questions Grow
summary: Michael Burry has opened a high profile short position in Caterpillar (NYSE:CAT), reversing his previous bullish stance. He is publicly flagging what he sees as extreme valuation and overexposure to the AI and infrastructure theme despite record company performance. The move comes as Caterpillar has been added to the Russell Top 50 Index and continues to be framed as an AI infrastructure beneficiary. Caterpillar sits at the center of several powerful themes, from large scale infrastructure...
